name: data-protection
description: GDPR operations for law firms and DPOs (4 skills): DPIA (Art. 35-36), 72h breach response (Art. 33-34), data subject rights / DSAR (Art. 12, 15-22), records of processing RoPA and processor-contract DPA review (Art. 30, 28). Grounded in the GDPR articles and EDPB guidelines. No connectors, sends nothing out.
